goal: Install Supabase, create the human handoff SQL document, typed client, auth hooks, auth UI, route protection, and pass build.
summary:
Phase 1 — Foundation complete. All 10 steps finished:
1. SUPABASE_STEPS.md created with full schema, RLS, triggers, storage, and checklist.
2. Installed @supabase/supabase-js, @supabase/auth-ui-react, browser-image-compression.
3-4. Created typed client src/lib/supabase.ts and placeholder src/types/database.ts.
5-6. Created AuthContext.tsx and auth.ts helpers.
7-9. Created Auth page, ProtectedRoute, and wired routing in App.tsx.
10. Build verified successfully.
stepSummaries:
1. Create SUPABASE_STEPS.md containing full schema SQL, RLS policies, Postgres RPC/trigger functions, storage bucket instructions, type generation command, and a human checklist. [verified]
  2. Install @supabase/supabase-js, @supabase/auth-ui-react, and browser-image-compression. [verified]
  3. Create src/lib/supabase.ts with createClient<Database> using VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. [verified]
  4. Create src/types/database.ts with a minimal Database interface covering all tables as placeholders, plus a TODO comment with the full type-generation CLI command. [verified]
  5. Create src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx that listens to supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange and exposes session, user, loading, signOut. [verified]
  6. Create src/lib/auth.ts with signUp (auto-inserts profiles row), signIn, signOut, signInWithGoogle, signInWithGitHub. [verified]
  7. Create src/pages/Auth.tsx using @supabase/auth-ui-react with Google + GitHub OAuth, styled with existing Tailwind/shadcn tokens. [verified]
  8. Create src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx that redirects to /auth if not logged in and shows a loading state while auth initializes. [verified]
  9. Modify src/App.tsx to wrap with AuthProvider, add /auth route, and wrap all other routes with ProtectedRoute. [verified]
  10. Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript or build errors after foundation changes. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 10 (npm run build) is real syntactic verification that exercises all TypeScript and bundling logic for every file created in this phase. Steps 1-9 used proxy/file-existence verifications, but the build step proves all new modules integrate without compile errors. No step is entirely hollow.
gateVerdicts.evidence: npm run build output: 2524 modules transformed, built in 9.68s, exit code 0.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was: install Supabase, create handoff doc, typed client, auth hooks, auth UI, route protection, and pass build. Artifacts: SUPABASE_STEPS.md, src/lib/supabase.ts, src/types/database.ts, src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx, src/lib/auth.ts, src/pages/Auth.tsx, src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx, modified src/App.tsx. Build passing proves integration.
Nothing deferred. All planned Phase 1 artifacts are created and the build is clean.
